3.1 Theory Operationalization procedures
The purpose of the operationalization phase is essentially “an explicit connection
between the conceptualization phase and practice. The operationalization of a the-
ory needs to be confirmed and/or tested in its real-world context” ([23], p. 232).
Thus, the operationalization addresses two aspects ([36], p. 327):
– Operationalizing theoretical constructs into empirical variables.
– Operationalizing theoretical propositions into empirically testable hypotheses.
